title: Can't pull image from insecure registry with registries.conf configured
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

I'm trying to pull an image from a private registry and as I'm getting `http: server gave HTTP response to HTTPS client` I already added the registry host as an insecure registry. But when I try to pull the image with `--tls-verify=false` works fine. I don't know if this could be related to this https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11933 issue.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Added to `$HOME/.config/containers/registries.conf` the registry where I intend to pull the image
```
unqualified-search-registries = ["my-insecure-registry:1234"]

[[registry]]
insecure = true
location = "my-insecure-registry:1234"
```

2. I pull the image: `podman pull [image_tag]`

**Describe the results you received:**

```
Trying to pull my-insecure-registry:1234/xpto/centos:x86-7...
Error: initializing source docker://my-insecure-registry:1234/xpto/centos:x86-7: pinging container registry my-insecure-registry:1234: Get "https://my-insecure-registry:1234/v2/": http: server gave HTTP response to HTTPS client
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Pull the image

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**


comments.body: If possible, can you share the output with `podman --log-level=debug`?

@vrothberg 
Here is:

```
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug
DEBU[0000] Called pull.PersistentPreRunE(podman pull my-insecure-registry:1234/xpto/centos:x86-7 --log-level=debug)
DEBU[0000] SSH Ident Key "/Users/alvesb/.ssh/podman-machine-default" SHA256:EhvzKT5WltDbqu9GH9FoyXQjldY63yA5mB9pajNzVvs ssh-ed25519
DEBU[0000] Found SSH_AUTH_SOCK "/private/tmp/com.apple.launchd.YgjSvUFJAw/Listeners", ssh-agent signer(s) enabled
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v3.4.4/libpod/_ping
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/Users/alvesb/.config/containers/registries.conf"
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: POST URI: http://d/v3.4.4/libpod/images/pull
```

Apologies for not noticing earlier in the info output.  It seems you are running on a Mac.  The registries.conf is a server-side setting.  Could you do a `podman machine ssh` and change it in `/etc/containers/registries.conf`?
Please ignore the labels ... I am in process of creating labels for all platforms for easier spotting if it's a linux, mac or win issue.
Thanks @vrothberg for your help! Maybe the troubleshooting guide (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md) could be updated, this looks like it could help Mac users.
Sure, I'll open a PR in the next few days ;)
